title: The Lovers of Verona
writer: William Shakespeare, André Cayatte, Jacques Prévert
actors: Serge Reggiani, Anouk Aimée, Pierre Brasseur
plot: Angelo, a glass-blower from Murano, and Georgia Maglia, the pretty daughter of a fallen fascist magistrate, are chosen to be the stand-ins for the stars of a film version of "Romeo and Juliet" being shot on location in Venice and ...
